mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_banner t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.id},'%')
AND t.banner_url like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.bannerUrl},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.sort},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by sort desc,create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM castle_banner t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.id},'%')
AND t.banner_url like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.bannerUrl},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.sort},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{castleBannerEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_banner t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
